---
title: "From Clicks to Conversions"
subtitle: "AI-Powered Email Personalization Strategies for MEin3D"
author: "Serena Shi"
institute: "M.S. Digital Marketing · Cal Poly Pomona"
date: "2025"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, slides-theme.scss]
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    footer: "Serena Shi · From Clicks to Conversions · Cal Poly Pomona MSDM"
    width: 1280
    height: 720
---

## The Challenge {background-color="#2a2828"}

::: {.incremental}
- MEin3D offers a unique experience: custom 3D-printed figurines from real body scans
- **High traffic. Low conversions.**
- Users were arriving — and leaving before booking an appointment
- No email follow-up. No behavioral targeting. No second chance.
:::

::: {.fragment}
> *"We were leaving money — and memories — on the table."*
:::

---

## Research Questions

1. **Where** in the funnel are users dropping off?
2. **Why** are they not completing the appointment form?
3. **How** can AI-powered email personalization close the gap?

---

## Methodology {background-color="#f5f0ec"}

### Analytics Infrastructure Built

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Data Collection**

- GA4 implementation from scratch
- Custom event tracking: page views, scroll depth, CTA clicks, form starts
- Funnel exploration reports
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Analysis Approach**

- Drop-off analysis at each funnel stage
- Behavioral segmentation modeling
- Email framework design by segment
:::
:::

---

## Conversion Funnel {background-color="#faf8f5"}

```{=html}
<div style="padding:1rem 0;">
  <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.6rem;">
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.2rem; font-size:0.85rem;">
        <span>Landing Page</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">1,000 (100%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#e8d8cc; height:32px; width:100%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.2rem; font-size:0.85rem;">
        <span>Services</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">640 (64%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#d4a882; height:32px; width:64%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.2rem; font-size:0.85rem;">
        <span>Pricing</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">380 (38%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#c49078; height:32px; width:38%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.2rem; font-size:0.85rem;">
        <span>Contact Form</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">190 (19%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#b5785a; height:32px; width:19%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.2rem; font-size:0.85rem;">
        <span>Submission ✓</span><span style="color:#2a2828; font-weight:600;">52 (5.2%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#2a2828; height:32px; width:5.2%;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.65rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:0.75rem; font-style:italic;">* Illustrative data for educational purposes.</p>
</div>
```

---

## Key Drop-Off Points

| Stage | Drop-Off | Primary Cause |
|-------|:---:|---|
| Landing → Services | 36% | Unclear value proposition |
| Services → Pricing | 41% | Transparency gap |
| Pricing → Form | 50% | No nurturing / urgency |
| Form → Submission | 73% | Friction in completion |

::: {.fragment}
**The biggest opportunity:** Recapture users who reached Pricing but didn't convert.
:::

---

## AI Personalization Framework {background-color="#2a2828"}

| Segment | Behavioral Signal | Email Angle |
|---|---|---|
| Gift Buyers | Holiday browsing | *Make it unforgettable.* |
| Personal Memorial | Emotional content pages | *Preserve what matters.* |
| Corporate | Long dwell + multi-session | *Your team, in 3D.* |
| Re-engagement | Form abandon / bounce | *You were this close.* |

---

## Projected Lift by Segment

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; padding:1rem 0;">
  <div>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem; font-size:0.9rem;">
      <span>Re-engagement</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">+31%</span>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#2a2828; height:36px; width:82%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:1rem;">
      <span style="color:#faf8f5; font-size:0.8rem;">+31%</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem; font-size:0.9rem;">
      <span>Personal Memorial</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">+24%</span>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#b5785a; height:36px; width:63%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:1rem;">
      <span style="color:#faf8f5; font-size:0.8rem;">+24%</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem; font-size:0.9rem;">
      <span>Gift Buyers</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">+18%</span>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#c49078; height:36px; width:48%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:1rem;">
      <span style="color:#faf8f5; font-size:0.8rem;">+18%</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem; font-size:0.9rem;">
      <span>Corporate</span><span style="color:#b5785a;">+15%</span>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#d4a882; height:36px; width:40%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:1rem;">
      <span style="color:#2a2828; font-size:0.8rem;">+15%</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## The 90-Day Roadmap

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
### Days 1–30
**Foundation**

- GA4 full configuration
- Form event tracking
- Segment identification
- Baseline metrics set
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Days 31–60
**Launch**

- 4-email nurture sequence
- A/B test subject lines
- Re-engagement flow
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Days 61–90
**Optimize**

- AI segmentation deployed
- Personalized flows per audience
- Monthly performance review
:::
:::

---

## Key Takeaways {background-color="#b5785a"}

::: {.incremental}
1. **The funnel is leaky — but fixable.**
2. **Generic email doesn't work.** Behavioral segmentation creates 1:1 conversations.
3. **AI personalization is not a luxury.** For a small brand, it's the edge.
4. **Data infrastructure comes first.** You can't personalize what you can't measure.
:::

---

## Thank You {background-color="#2a2828"}

::: {style="text-align:center; padding:2rem;"}
**Serena Shi**  
M.S. Digital Marketing Candidate · Cal Poly Pomona

📧 serenashi772010@gmail.com  
🔗 LinkedIn · 🌏 小红书 RED

::: {style="margin-top:2rem; font-style:italic; color:#d4a882;"}
*"Turn curiosity into conversion."*
:::
:::
